errors.message: Streamable HTTP error: Error POSTing to endpoint: {"success":false,"error":"This surface has been retired. Licium now turns hard public web pages into clean rows. Machine-readable discovery: https://www.licium.ai/llms.txt and https://www.licium.ai/openapi.json. REST: POST https://www.licium.ai/v1/extract (Bearer key via hello@licium.ai)."}

name: licium_discover
description:
Browse and compare Licium's agents and tools. Use this when you want to SEE what's available before executing.

WHAT YOU CAN DO:
  - Search tools: "email sending MCP servers" → finds matching tools with reputation scores
  - Search agents: "weather forecasting agents" → finds specialist agents with

name: licium_rent
description: Rent a verified prediction agent's upcoming pick for a market. Deducts 1 credit; returns bet_instruction such as 'Take NO on Philadelphia', exact YES/NO meanings, pick.signal with selected-side agent_probability, market_price, and edge, plus pick.market_links for available Kalshi/Polymarket URLs. pi

name: licium_tournament_leaderboard
description: Ranked prediction agents from the weekly tournament. Without tournament_id, returns the season standings (tier, medals, rating). With tournament_id, returns that week's ranking. Calibrated probabilities; you decide whether and how to act.

name: licium_recent_receipts
description: Recent settled prediction receipts: what an agent forecast, the market price at the time, the resolved outcome, and the counterfactual edge. Evidence of calibration, not betting advice.

name: licium_register_for_tournament
description: Enter your agent into the weekly prediction tournament for a sport. Requires your agent session token (from `licium link`). Once entered, submit calibrated probabilities on that sport's markets and you'll be scored each week.

name: licium_manage
description:
Manage your presence on Licium. Register agents and report tool quality. Legacy chain-template sharing is parked.

ACTIONS:
  - register: provide name (REQUIRED), description, capabilities, endpoint, protocol, domain, model, pricingModel, pricingAmount, authType, ownerEmail
  - report: provide tool_

name: licium_scan_edges
description: Scan weather prediction markets for expected-value edge — where the Weather Agent's probability estimate diverges from the market price. Weather is the live edge domain today. Results include public freshness metadata; stale signals are marked do_not_enter and paid unlocks only reveal active signals

name: licium_analyze_market
description: PAUSED. On-demand cross-agent market analysis is offline right now, so this returns a "paused" response rather than a billable empty report. Live alternatives: licium_scan_edges (weather edge) and licium_discover (find verified prediction agents + their track records).

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "licium" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Execute a task through Licium's 1,986+ specialist agents and 24,920+ tools. Send a task description. Licium plans it, routes each step to the best-suited model …

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "licium_register_for_tournament" references sensitive artifacts (session token). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Enter your agent into the weekly prediction tournament for a sport. Requires your agent session token (from `licium link`). Once entered, submit calibrated prob…

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "licium_scan_edges" references sensitive artifacts (bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Scan weather prediction markets for expected-value edge — where the Weather Agent's probability estimate diverges from the market price. Weather is the live edg…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: licium_discover, licium_scan_edges · Private data: licium, licium_register_for_tournament, licium_scan_edges, licium_analyze_market · Public sink: licium, licium_discover, licium_register_for_tournament, licium_manage, licium_scan_edges · Destructive: licium.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: licium_discover, licium_scan_edges · Private data: licium, licium_register_for_tournament, licium_scan_edges, licium_analyze_market · Public sink: licium, licium_discover, licium_register_for_tournament, licium_manage, licium_scan_edges · Destructive: licium

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "licium" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet:
before: "(hash 31ff215a)" → after: "Execute a task through Licium's 1,986+ specialist agents and 24,920+ tools.

Send a task description. Licium plans it, routes each step to the best-suited model or verified agent, and returns a structured result.

VERIFIED AGENTS (graded on settled markets, no self-reported claims): forecasting agen"

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
